people.name: Arthur Leite Duarte
people.bio: Arthur Leite Duarte was born in 2004 and carries forward both the Duarte and Leite family legacies.

people.name: Wietze Wiebenga
people.bio: Wietze Wiebenga is the father of Harry Wiebenga.

people.name: Janke Vis
people.bio: Janke Vis is the mother of Harry Wiebenga.

people.name: Jan Kuiper
people.bio: Jan Kuiper is the father of Roberta Kuiper Wiebenga.

people.name: Tijpke DeJong
people.bio: Tijpke DeJong is the mother of Roberta Kuiper Wiebenga.

people.name: Harry Wiebenga
people.bio: Harry Wiebenga, originally Harm Wiebenga, was born in 1908 in Benedenknijpe. He married Roberta Kuiper Wiebenga in 1934 in Schoterland, moved to Canada with her in 1947, and died in 1976 in Aylmer, Canada.

people.name: Roberta Kuiper Wiebenga
people.bio: Roberta Kuiper Wiebenga, originally Rinske Kuiper Wiebenga, was born in 1910 in Mildam. She married Harry Wiebenga in 1934 in Schoterland, moved to Canada with him in 1947, and died in 1999 in Aylmer.

people.name: Sandra Wiebenga DenHarder
people.bio: Sandra Wiebenga DenHarder, born in 1940, is the daughter of Harry Wiebenga and Roberta Kuiper Wiebenga.

people.name: John DenHarder
people.bio: John DenHarder was born in 1942 in The Hague, married Sandra Wiebenga DenHarder, and died in 2020 in Aylmer.

people.name: Bill Wiebenga
people.bio: Bill Wiebenga, originally William Wiebenga, was born in 1938 in Tjalleberd. He is the son of Harry Wiebenga and Roberta Kuiper Wiebenga and died in 2017 in St. Thomas.

people.name: Trudy Mantel
people.bio: Trudy Mantel, originally Truus Mantel, was born in 1943 in Andijk, married Bill Wiebenga, and died in 2018 in Aylmer.

people.name: Dawn Lelane
people.bio: Dawn Lelane is the daughter of Bill Wiebenga and Trudy Mantel and the mother of Jeff Wiebenga.

people.name: Jeff Wiebenga
people.bio: Jeff Wiebenga was born in Aylmer and is the child of Dawn Lelane.

people.name: Kevin DenHarder
people.bio: Kevin DenHarder is the child of Sandra Wiebenga DenHarder and John DenHarder. He is married to Jena and has a son and a daughter.

people.name: Jena
people.bio: Jena is linked here as Kevin DenHarder's spouse.

people.name: Sharlene DenHarder
people.bio: Sharlene DenHarder is the child of Sandra Wiebenga DenHarder and John DenHarder. She has two sons.

people.name: Robbie DenHarder
people.bio: Robbie DenHarder is the child of Sandra Wiebenga DenHarder and John DenHarder. He has a son and a daughter.

people.name: John Wiebenga
people.bio: John Wiebenga, born in 1942, is the son of Harry Wiebenga and Roberta Kuiper Wiebenga.

people.name: Pam McDermid
people.bio: Pam McDermid is linked here as John Wiebenga's spouse.

people.name: Sam Wiebenga
people.bio: Sam Wiebenga, originally Sietze Wiebenga, was born in 1944 in De Knijpe, Netherlands. He is the son of Harry Wiebenga and Roberta Kuiper Wiebenga, married Eva Catharina DeKraker Wiebenga in 1966 in Aylmer, and died in 2007 in Aylmer, Canada.

people.name: Eva Catharina DeKraker Wiebenga
people.bio: Eva Catharina DeKraker Wiebenga, born in 1944, married Sam Wiebenga in 1966 in Aylmer and is the mother of Sherry Wiebenga Berkelmans, Willy Wiebenga, and Trevor Wiebenga.

people.name: Sherry Wiebenga Berkelmans
people.bio: Sherry Wiebenga Berkelmans is the daughter of Sam Wiebenga and Eva Catharina DeKraker Wiebenga.

people.name: Frank Berkelmans
people.bio: Frank Berkelmans is linked here as Sherry Wiebenga Berkelmans's spouse.

people.name: Willy Wiebenga
people.bio: Willy Wiebenga is the son of Sam Wiebenga and Eva Catharina DeKraker Wiebenga.

people.name: Crystal Wiebenga
people.bio: Crystal Wiebenga is linked here as Willy Wiebenga's spouse.

people.name: Yvon St-Jean
people.bio: Yvon St-Jean married Suzanne Bercier in 1972 in Treadwell, Ontario, and they had Eric St-Jean and Annie St-Jean Wiebenga.

people.name: Suzanne Bercier
people.bio: Suzanne Bercier married Yvon St-Jean in 1972 in Treadwell, Ontario, and they had Eric St-Jean and Annie St-Jean Wiebenga.

people.name: Eric St-Jean
people.bio: Eric St-Jean is the son of Yvon St-Jean and Suzanne Bercier, the brother of Annie St-Jean Wiebenga, and the father of Isabelle St-Jean, Maxim St-Jean, Anthony St-Jean, and Julia St-Jean. His children Isabelle and Maxim are from a previous marriage whose spouse is not yet recorded here.

people.name: Claudine Couture
people.bio: Claudine Couture is Eric St-Jean's spouse and the mother of Anthony St-Jean and Julia St-Jean.

people.name: Isabelle St-Jean
people.bio: Isabelle St-Jean is the daughter of Eric St-Jean from a previous marriage.

people.name: Maxim St-Jean
people.bio: Maxim St-Jean is the child of Eric St-Jean from a previous marriage.

people.name: Anthony St-Jean
people.bio: Anthony St-Jean is the son of Eric St-Jean and Claudine Couture.

people.name: Julia St-Jean
people.bio: Julia St-Jean is the daughter of Eric St-Jean and Claudine Couture.

people.name: Tania Wiebenga
people.bio: Tania Wiebenga is the daughter of Trevor Wiebenga and Annie St-Jean Wiebenga.

people.name: Trevor Wiebenga
people.bio: Trevor Wiebenga is the son of Sam Wiebenga and Eva Catharina DeKraker Wiebenga. He married Annie St-Jean, and they are the parents of Tania Wiebenga and Amy-Lee Wiebenga.

people.name: Annie St-Jean Wiebenga
people.bio: Annie St-Jean Wiebenga, born Annie St-Jean, is the daughter of Yvon St-Jean and Suzanne Bercier, the sister of Eric St-Jean, and the mother of Tania Wiebenga and Amy-Lee Wiebenga.

people.name: Amy-Lee Wiebenga
people.bio: Amy-Lee Wiebenga is the daughter of Trevor Wiebenga and Annie St-Jean Wiebenga, and the sister of Tania Wiebenga.

people.name: Samantha Berkelmans
people.bio: Samantha Berkelmans is the child of Sherry Wiebenga Berkelmans and Frank Berkelmans.

people.name: Kelsey Berkelmans
people.bio: Kelsey Berkelmans is the child of Sherry Wiebenga Berkelmans and Frank Berkelmans.

people.name: Blake Berkelmans
people.bio: Blake Berkelmans is the child of Sherry Wiebenga Berkelmans and Frank Berkelmans.

people.name: Danae Berkelmans
people.bio: Danae Berkelmans is the child of Sherry Wiebenga Berkelmans and Frank Berkelmans.

people.name: Troy Berkelmans
people.bio: Troy Berkelmans is the child of Sherry Wiebenga Berkelmans and Frank Berkelmans.

people.name: Morgan Wiebenga
people.bio: Morgan Wiebenga is the child of Willy Wiebenga and Crystal Wiebenga.

people.name: Hunter Wiebenga
people.bio: Hunter Wiebenga is the child of Willy Wiebenga and Crystal Wiebenga.

people.name: Alisson Wiebenga
people.bio: Alisson Wiebenga is the child of Willy Wiebenga and Crystal Wiebenga.

people.name: Francisco de Almeida Duarte
people.bio: Francisco de Almeida Duarte, born in 1972, is the son of Airan Valdemar Duarte and Ione Beatriz Scola de Almeida.

people.name: Cristiane Alano Leite
people.bio: Cristiane Alano Leite is the daughter of Luiz Fernando Costa Leite and Marlene Alano Leite.

people.name: Airan Valdemar Duarte
people.bio: Airan Valdemar Duarte was born on 5 de janeiro de 1939 in Porto Alegre, Rio Grande do Sul, Brasil, and died on 21 de abril de 1985 in Porto Alegre, Rio Grande do Sul, Brasil. He was the son of Manoel dos Santos Duarte and Martha Barbosa Duarte.

people.name: Ione Beatriz Scola de Almeida
people.bio: Ione Beatriz Scola de Almeida was born on 12 de janeiro de 1942 in Porto Alegre, Rio Grande do Sul, Brasil, and died on 03/01/2011 in Porto Alegre, Rio Grande do Sul, Brasil. She was the daughter of Hermes Baptista de Almeida and Thomazina Scola.

people.name: Flavio de Almeida Duarte
people.bio: Flavio de Almeida Duarte was born in 1964 and died in 1964. He was the child of Airan Valdemar Duarte and Ione Beatriz Scola de Almeida.

people.name: Manoel dos Santos Duarte
people.bio: Manoel dos Santos Duarte was born on 5 de janeiro de 1908 and died on 25 de julho de 1988 in Porto Alegre, Rio Grande do Sul, Brasil.

people.name: Martha Barbosa Duarte
people.bio: Martha Barbosa Duarte was born on 16 November 1910 and died on 23 de agosto de 1986 in Porto Alegre, Rio Grande do Sul, Brasil.

people.name: Fortunato Scola
people.bio: Fortunato Scola is recorded here as deceased on 16 March 1809 in Agropoli, Salerno, Campania, Italy.

people.name: Anna Amendola
people.bio: Anna Amendola is recorded here as the spouse of Fortunato Scola and mother of Rosa Scola and Giuseppe Scola.

people.name: Rosa Scola
people.bio: Rosa Scola was born in 1800 and is recorded here as deceased. She was the child of Fortunato Scola and Anna Amendola.

people.name: Giuseppe Scola
people.bio: Giuseppe Scola was born on 8 de maio de 1807 in Laureana Cilento, Salerno, Campania, Italia. He was the child of Fortunato Scola and Anna Amendola and is recorded here as deceased in Castellabate, Salerno, Campania, Italia.

people.name: Angela Rosa Spinelli
people.bio: Angela Rosa Spinelli was born on 3 de marco de 1809 in Camella, Perdifumo, Salerno, Campania, Italia, and died on 28 de maio de 1886 in Castellabate, Salerno, Campania, Italia.

people.name: Antonio Di Scola
people.bio: Antonio Di Scola, also known as Antonio Scola, was born on 10 de outubro de 1839 in Perdifumo, Salerno, Italia. He was the child of Giuseppe Scola and Angela Rosa Spinelli, married Raffaella Guzzo on 5 de outubro de 1874 in Italia, and is recorded here as deceased.

people.name: Raffaella Guzzo
people.bio: Raffaella Guzzo was born on 1 de agosto de 1859 in Castellabate, Salerno, Campania, Italia and is recorded here as deceased.

people.name: Francesco Paolo di Scola
people.bio: Francesco Paolo di Scola, also known as Francisco Paula Scola, was born on 13 de setembro de 1885 in Castellabate, Salerno, Campania, Italia. He was the son of Antonio Di Scola and Raffaella Guzzo, married Angelina Rocco on 4 de abril de 1908 at Igreja do Rosario in Porto Alegre, and died on 7 de janeiro de 1935 in Porto Alegre, Rio Grande do Sul, Brasil.

people.name: Angelina Rocco
people.bio: Angelina Rocco, also known as Angelina Roque Scola, was born on 28 de outubro de 1887 in Porto Alegre, Rio Grande do Sul, Brasil, was christened on 11 de junho de 1888 in Porto Alegre, Rio Grande do Sul, Brasil, married Francesco Paolo di Scola on 4 de abril de 1908 at Igreja do Rosario in Porto Alegre, and died on 16 de novembro de 1918 in Porto Alegre, Rio Grande do Sul, Brasil.

people.name: Antonio Scola
people.bio: Antonio Scola was born in 1909 and died in 1972. He was the child of Francesco Paolo di Scola and Angelina Rocco.

people.name: Hermes Baptista de Almeida
people.bio: Hermes Baptista de Almeida was born on 22 de outubro de 1909 in Porto Alegre, Rio Grande do Sul, Brasil, was christened on 5 de marco de 1911 in Porto Alegre, Rio Grande do Sul, Brasil, and died on 7 de agosto de 1957 in Porto Alegre, Rio Grande do Sul, Brasil.

people.name: Thomazina Scola
people.bio: Thomazina Scola was born on 30 de dezembro de 1910 in Porto Alegre, Rio Grande do Sul, Brasil, and died on 15 de outubro de 1980 in Porto Alegre, Rio Grande do Sul, Brasil. She was the daughter of Francesco Paolo di Scola and Angelina Rocco.

people.name: Jose Paulo Rocco Scola
people.bio: Jose Paulo Rocco Scola was born in 1911 and died in 1958. He was the child of Francesco Paolo di Scola and Angelina Rocco.

people.name: Rafaela Scola Dias
people.bio: Rafaela Scola Dias was born in 1912 and died in 1952. She was the child of Francesco Paolo di Scola and Angelina Rocco.

people.name: Vicente Scola
people.bio: Vicente Scola was born in 1915 and is recorded here as deceased. He was the child of Francesco Paolo di Scola and Angelina Rocco.

people.name: Holanda Scola Palmeiro
people.bio: Holanda Scola Palmeiro was born in 1916 and died in 1975. She was the child of Francesco Paolo di Scola and Angelina Rocco.

people.name: Carmela Di Scola
people.bio: Carmela Di Scola was born on 11 de janeiro de 1883 in Castellabate, Salerno, Italia. She married Andrea Ippolito on 21 de abril de 1903 in Porto Alegre, Rio Grande do Sul, Brasil, and died on 17 de setembro de 1961 in Porto Alegre, Rio Grande do Sul, Brasil.

people.name: Andrea Ippolito
people.bio: Andrea Ippolito, also known as Andre Hippolyto, was born on 6 de fevereiro de 1876 in Castellabate, Salerno, Campania, Italia. He married Carmela Di Scola on 21 de abril de 1903 in Porto Alegre, Rio Grande do Sul, Brasil, and is recorded here as deceased in Rio Grande do Sul, Brasil.

people.name: Giovannina Ippolito
people.bio: Giovannina Ippolito was born in 1904 and is recorded here as deceased. She was the child of Carmela Di Scola and Andrea Ippolito.

people.name: Rafaela Hippolyto
people.bio: Rafaela Hippolyto was born in 1905 and died in 1973. She was the child of Carmela Di Scola and Andrea Ippolito.

people.name: Costabile Hipolito Sobrinho
people.bio: Costabile Hipolito Sobrinho was born in 1908 and died in 1969. He was the child of Carmela Di Scola and Andrea Ippolito.

people.name: Octavio Hippolito
people.bio: Octavio Hippolito was born in 1912 and died in 1969. He was the child of Carmela Di Scola and Andrea Ippolito.

people.name: Luiz Fernando Costa Leite
people.bio: Luiz Fernando Costa Leite (1946–2020) was the son of Raphael Paiva Leite and Nair Garcia Costa, continuing the Leite lineage into the next generation.

people.name: Marlene Alano Leite
people.bio: Marlene Alano Leite is the daughter of Antonio Alano and Maria Guilhermina Alano, representing the Alano family branch.

people.name: Raphael Paiva Leite
people.bio: Raphael Paiva Leite (1911–1998) was part of the Leite ancestry and father of Luiz Fernando.

people.name: Nair Garcia Costa
people.bio: Nair Garcia Costa (1912–Deceased) was part of the Costa family and mother of Luiz Fernando.

people.name: Antonio Alano
people.bio: Antonio Alano (1908–2004) represents an earlier generation of the Alano family.

people.name: Maria Guilhermina Alano
people.bio: Maria Guilhermina Alano (1913–1986) carried the Alano name into the next generation as the mother of Marlene.

people.name: Fabio de Almeida Duarte
people.bio: Fabio de Almeida Duarte (1966-2021) is part of the Duarte sibling branch descending from Airan and Ione.

people.name: Felipe de Almeida Duarte
people.bio: Felipe de Almeida Duarte (1971-Present) belongs to the same Duarte generation as Francisco and his brothers.

people.name: Fernando de Almeida Duarte
people.bio: Fernando de Almeida Duarte (1972-Present) is included in the Duarte sibling line rooted in Airan and Ione.

people.name: Marta Fortuna
people.bio: Marta Fortuna is linked here as Fabio de Almeida Duarte's spouse.

people.name: Liane Batista
people.bio: Liane Batista is linked here as Felipe de Almeida Duarte's spouse.

people.name: Angelica Fanfa Freitas
people.bio: Angelica Fanfa Freitas is linked here as Fernando de Almeida Duarte's spouse.

people.name: Odilon Antonio Duarte
people.bio: Odilon Antonio Duarte is one of the children of Manoel dos Santos Duarte and Martha Barbosa Duarte.

people.name: Daniele Alano Leite
people.bio: Daniele Alano Leite is one of the children of Luiz Fernando Costa Leite and Marlene Alano Leite.

people.name: Fernanda Alano Leite
people.bio: Fernanda Alano Leite is one of the children of Luiz Fernando Costa Leite and Marlene Alano Leite.

people.name: Andre Romero
people.bio: Andre Romero is linked here as Fernanda Alano Leite's spouse.

people.name: Diego Fernando de Oliveira
people.bio: Diego Fernando de Oliveira is linked here as Daniele Alano Leite's spouse.

people.name: Gabriele Leite Romero
people.bio: Gabriele Leite Romero is the child of Fernanda Alano Leite and Andre Romero.

people.name: Mariana Leite Romero
people.bio: Mariana Leite Romero is the child of Fernanda Alano Leite and Andre Romero.

people.name: Yara Duarte
people.bio: Yara Duarte is one of the children of Manoel dos Santos Duarte and Martha Barbosa Duarte.

people.name: Yone Duarte
people.bio: Yone Duarte is one of the children of Manoel dos Santos Duarte and Martha Barbosa Duarte.

people.name: Iara Scola de Almeida
people.bio: Iara Scola de Almeida is one of the children of Hermes Baptista de Almeida and Thomazina Scola.

people.name: Henrique Fortuna Duarte
people.bio: Henrique Fortuna Duarte is the child of Fabio de Almeida Duarte and Marta Fortuna.

people.name: Matheus Batista Duarte
people.bio: Matheus Batista Duarte is the child of Felipe de Almeida Duarte and Liane Batista.

people.name: Rafael Freitas Duarte
people.bio: Rafael Freitas Duarte is the child of Fernando de Almeida Duarte and Angelica Fanfa Freitas.

people.name: Augusto Leite Duarte
people.bio: Augusto Leite Duarte is the child of Francisco de Almeida Duarte and Cristiane Alano Leite.
